S.FORM: == uulbalaw == ngangan ci uulbalaw ku ngangan u ngangan nu hulam ś≠źś≤ÉŚÖíś≥ēŤćĖ u etul u tatayna u nalecuhan 1993.05.13 u niyazu' u kawaw mikawaway namakay cuwa a cudad sulitan ni uulbalaw
S.PHON: == uur~…ĺbar~…ĺaw == ŇčaŇčan ¶i uur~…ĺbar~…ĺaw ku ŇčaŇčan u ŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺam ***** u …ôtur~…ĺ u tatajna u nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ****.**.** u nijazu Ē~ ° u kawaw mikawawaj namakaj ¶uwa a ¶udad sur~…ĺitan ni uur~…ĺbar~…ĺaw
